one_time_description: Grant revenue of $1,540,000 with no comparative prior year amount
economic_notes: Nation is member of Ma-Mook Development Corporation (forestry). Mamook Natural Resources Ltd 20% partnership. Ahousaht Fishing Corporation inactive and stricken from BC Corporate Registry.
notes: Audit is qualified for two reasons: (1) ARO liabilities under PS 3280 not identified/assessed; (2) Council did not formally approve budget so budget figures not presented in statements. Prior year auditor was Crowe MacKay LLP. Ahousaht Fishing Corporation (previously equity-accounted GBE) was stricken from BC Corporate Registry during the year. Four entities consolidated: Ahousaht Education Authority, 1139763 B.C. Ltd., Cha Chum Hi Yup Tiic Miss Society, Chimahnah Healing Centre Ltd. Deferred capital contributions of $3,327,986 relate to FNHA and The Annual Foundation. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + NTC + FNSA + Province of BC + Aboriginal Headstart + CMHC + First Nation Health Authority + Fisheries and Oceans Canada = 22,525,434 + 4,377,239 + 1,715,634 + 912,986 + 196,305 + 123,546 + 625,592 + 380,115 = 30,856,851.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
